description: tldraw provides an online collaborative whiteboard and a related SDK for building infinite-canvas applications. Its documentation describes client libraries and self-hosted collaboration components rather than a public hosted developer API on tldraw.com.
summary: tldraw.com exposes a public web whiteboard, while its developer-facing integration surface for this domain is effectively just a public npm scaffolding CLI reference; no public HTTP/GraphQL/MCP API on tldraw.com was documented.
